text:
Beautiful gazelle, so far from camp—
    Her love is angry with her; why her smile.
She smiles just thinking of those Edom girls,
    And Hagar's daughters too,
Who want to win him for themselves,
    Those desert-asses!
                        Can they vie with her
Who once was road-companion to the stag?
Did they have prophets? Did they have
    The lamp, the Ark
        Of Covenant?
Where did His presence lie?

Oh no, my rivals, you will never
Put out love; its raging flame can never die.
